marketOverview.title: Market Overview
marketOverview.tpexNoIndex: No index data for OTC market
marketOverview.staleBreadth: Breadth from {dataDate} ({mainDate} stocks not yet released)
marketOverview.dealerHedgeNote: Streak is based on dealer proprietary (self) trading, excluding hedging; the displayed net amount is the combined total including hedging.

volumePrice.weakUp: Up on shrinking volume — momentum fading

marginLeverage.overheating: Margin up while index rises — retail leverage building, watch for overheating
marginLeverage.healthyWashout: Index up, margin down — chips washed out, relatively healthy
marginLeverage.trapped: Index down, margin up — getting more trapped
marginLeverage.deleveraging: Index down, margin down — deleveraging underway

breadthTrend.confirmUp: New highs expanding — breadth confirms the upside
breadthTrend.divergence: Index up but new lows persist — watch for breadth divergence
breadthTrend.weakDown: New lows spreading — weakness not yet over

chipAnomaly.title: Chip Anomalies
chipAnomaly.subtitleHighPledge: Insider pledge ratio >{threshold}%, watch for forced selling
chipAnomaly.subtitleInsiderTransfer: Director or major shareholder filed transfer notice
chipAnomaly.subtitleShortSurge: Short selling surged, watch for downside pressure
chipAnomaly.subtitleInstitutionalSurge: Institutional net flow exceeds 5x recent average

desc.highPledge: Pledged {value} — forced sell risk if price drops
desc.foreignNearLimit: Foreign at {value} of ceiling — limited upside from inflows
desc.shortSurge: Short vol is {value} of 5-day avg — strong bearish pressure
desc.instMove: Large institutional move of {value} — monitor chip flow

watchlist.title: Watchlist
watchlist.deleteGroupConfirm: Delete group "{name}"? Its stocks will become ungrouped.

stockDetail.chartHint: Pinch to zoom and adjust time range

reasonTip.volumeSpike: Trading volume significantly increased, indicating major capital flow.
reasonTip.priceSpike: Abnormally large price movement in a single day.
reasonTip.institutional: Foreign or investment trust institutions show a clear directional change.
reasonTip.news: Recent news coverage may impact stock price movement.
reasonTip.rsiOverbought: RSI indicates overbought conditions, short-term pullback possible.
reasonTip.rsiOversold: RSI indicates oversold conditions, potential bounce opportunity.
reasonTip.revenueYoySurge: Revenue YoY growth surged significantly, strong fundamentals.
reasonTip.revenueYoyDecline: Revenue YoY growth declined significantly, weakening fundamentals.
reasonTip.revenueNewHigh: Revenue hit recent high, entering high-growth phase.
reasonTip.highDividendYield: High cash dividend yield, defensive value.
reasonTip.epsYoYSurge: Earnings per share YoY growth surged significantly.
reasonTip.epsConsecutiveGrowth: EPS growing for consecutive quarters, stable profit trend.
reasonTip.epsTurnaround: EPS turned from loss to profit, operational turnaround.
reasonTip.roeExcellent: Excellent return on equity, efficient management.
reasonTip.insiderSelling: Insiders have been reducing holdings recently.
reasonTip.foreignIncreasing: Foreign investor holdings increasing, showing continued confidence.
reasonTip.foreignDecreasing: Foreign investor holdings decreasing, turning cautious.
reasonTip.dayTradingHigh: High day-trading ratio, strong speculative activity.
reasonTip.concentrationHigh: High shareholding concentration among large holders.
reasonTip.bearishDivergence: Bearish divergence with price falling on increased volume.
reasonTip.foreignConcentration: High foreign investor concentration, concentration risk.
reasonTip.foreignExodus: Foreign capital accelerating outflow, selling pressure increasing.
reasonTip.priceVolumeWeakRally: Price rising on declining volume — weak rally warning, possible reversal ahead.
reasonTip.pullbackToMa20: Strong uptrend pulling back to MA20 with volume shrinking, trend intact — healthy entry timing.
reasonTip.hammerAtSupport: Strong stock testing MA20/MA60 support with bullish hammer formation — reversal entry point.
reasonTip.kdHighPullback: KD declining from overbought without dead cross, MA alignment maintained — momentum cooling, consider scaling in.
reasonTip.pullbackToMa10: Shallow pullback to MA10 in strong uptrend (close still above MA20), volume shrinking — daily dip-buying zone.

onboarding.step1Desc: Automatically analyze all stocks after market close using 60 rules covering technical, institutional, and fundamental factors to find the best opportunities.
onboarding.step2Desc: AI-powered summaries, chip strength scores, stock comparison, and strategy backtesting to help you make confident investment decisions.
onboarding.step3Desc: Set custom price alerts and technical indicator triggers. Get notified instantly when important signals occur.

Try again later or manually refresh

Go to Market Scan and
tap the star to add stocks
empty.noNewsHint: No related news at this time
empty.networkErrorHint: Please check your connection and try again

accessibility.sparklineTrendUp: Price up {change} percent over {days} days chart
accessibility.sparklineTrendDown: Price down {change} percent over {days} days chart

settings.title: Settings
settings.forceSyncDescription: Clear cache and re-download all data
settings.forceSyncConfirm: This will re-download all market data and may take a while. Continue?
settings.rateLimitMessageFinMind:
FinMind API has reached its hourly limit (600 requests).

Please wait 10-15 minutes before trying again, or consider upgrading to a paid FinMind plan.
settings.rateLimitMessageTransient:
The TWSE/TPEx data source is temporarily throttled due to rapid requests (not an hourly quota).

It usually recovers within a few minutes — please try syncing again shortly.
settings.showWarningBadgesDesc: Display attention/disposal/high pledge badges on watchlist
settings.insiderNotificationsDesc: Notify when insider holdings change significantly
settings.disposalUrgentAlertsDesc: Send urgent alerts when stocks are placed under disposal
settings.limitAlertsDesc: Show markers when watchlist stocks hit daily limit
settings.showROCYearDesc: Use ROC calendar year in fundamentals tab
settings.cacheDurationDesc: Caches fetched data to reduce repeated API calls
settings.autoUpdateDesc: Automatically update data after market close (15:00) and send notification
settings.autoUpdateFailed: Failed to schedule auto-update. Please try again later.

alert.title: Alerts
alert.noteHint: Add a note for this alert
alert.mustBePositive: Value must be greater than zero
alert.noAlertsHint: Tap the button to add an alert
alert.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this alert?

notification.title: Notification Settings
notification.enableDescription: Receive price alerts and update notifications
notification.priceAlertsDescription: Notify when stocks reach target price
notification.tradingWarningBody: This stock has been flagged for trading caution
notification.tradingDisposalBody: This stock is under trading disposal, trading restricted
notification.highPledgeRatioBody: High insider pledge ratio, exercise caution

filterMeta.reversalW2S: Consecutive Bullish candles (3-7 days), weak to strong trend
filterMeta.reversalS2W: Consecutive Bearish candles (3-7 days), strong to weak trend
filterMeta.volumeSpike: Volume > 4x Avg Vol AND Price Change > 1.5%
filterMeta.institutionalBuy: 3 institutional investors net buy today (reversal, acceleration, or large signal)
filterMeta.institutionalSell: 3 institutional investors net sell today (reversal, acceleration, or large signal)
filterMeta.dayTradingHigh: Day trading ratio ≧ 50% AND volume ≥ 10k lots
filterMeta.dayTradingExtreme: Day trading ratio ≧ 70% AND volume ≥ 30k lots
filterMeta.hintEmpty: No matching stocks today, or data not synced.
filterMeta.priceVolumeWeakRally: Price Up, Volume Down (Weak Rally Warning)

summary.title: AI Analysis
summary.overallUp: Currently in an uptrend, closing at {close}, up {change}%.
summary.overallDown: Currently in a downtrend, closing at {close}, down {change}%.
summary.overallRange: Currently in a consolidation range, closing at {close}.
summary.marketBullish: Market in uptrend (above quarterly MA) — favorable backdrop.
summary.marketBearish: Market in downtrend (below quarterly MA) — bullish signals warrant caution.
summary.marketNeutral: Market range-bound (MAs entangled) — rely on stock-level signals.
summary.reversalW2S: Weak-to-strong reversal signal detected, trend may turn bullish.
summary.reversalS2W: Strong-to-weak reversal signal detected, trend may turn bearish.
summary.riskReward: Estimated risk/reward ~1:{ratio} (target at resistance, stop at support).
summary.riskRewardFavorable: Upside notably exceeds downside — favorable odds.
summary.riskRewardPoor: Downside now exceeds upside — unfavorable odds.
summary.scoreExceptional: Score {score}, highly concentrated signals with strong short-term momentum.
summary.scoreWorthwatching: Score {score}, supported by technical factors, worth continued monitoring.
summary.volumeSpike: Volume reached {multiple}x the 20-day average, significant volume increase.
summary.priceSpike: Daily price change of {pctChange}%, high volatility.
summary.breakout: Price broke above resistance, technical breakout signal.
summary.breakdown: Price broke below support, technical breakdown signal.
summary.kdGoldenCross: KD golden cross at low levels, short-term bullish signal.
summary.kdDeathCross: KD death cross at high levels, short-term bearish signal.
summary.week52High: Price at 52-week high, strong bullish momentum.
summary.week52Low: Price near 52-week low, potential oversold territory.
summary.maAlignmentBullish: Moving averages in bullish alignment (5>10>20>60), medium-term uptrend.
summary.maAlignmentBearish: Moving averages in bearish alignment, medium-term downtrend.
summary.rsiOversold: RSI at {rsi}, entering oversold territory, potential bounce.
summary.institutionalBuyStreakDays: Institutional buy streak: {days} days, sustained momentum.
summary.institutionalSellStreak: Institutional consecutive selling, heavy selling pressure.
summary.institutionalSellStreakDays: Institutional sell streak: {days} days, heavy selling pressure.
summary.institutionalBuy: Institutional net buying today, positive fund flow.
summary.institutionalSell: Institutional net selling today, negative fund flow.
summary.revenueYoySurge: Revenue YoY growth of {growth}%, strong fundamentals.
summary.revenueYoyDecline: Revenue YoY decline of {growth}%, weakening fundamentals.
summary.revenueMomGrowth: Revenue growing MoM for {months} consecutive months.
summary.revenueNewHigh: Revenue hit recent high, surpassing previous high by {surpassPct}%.
summary.pbrUndervalued: P/B ratio at {pbr}x, trading below book value.
summary.epsYoYSurge: EPS YoY growth of {growth}%, significant earnings growth.
summary.epsTurnaround: EPS turned from loss to profit, operational turnaround.
summary.epsDecline: EPS in consecutive decline, weakening profitability.
summary.roeExcellent: ROE at {roe}%, excellent return on equity.
summary.patternHammer: Hammer pattern, potential bottom reversal signal.
summary.patternHangingMan: Hanging man pattern, potential bearish reversal.
summary.patternMorningStar: Morning star pattern, strong bottom reversal signal.
summary.patternEveningStar: Evening star pattern, strong top reversal signal.
summary.patternThreeWhiteSoldiers: Three white soldiers pattern, strong bullish momentum.
summary.patternThreeBlackCrows: Three black crows pattern, strong bearish momentum.
summary.warningAttention: Stock is on the attention list, trade with caution.
summary.warningDisposal: Stock is on the disposal list, trading restricted.
summary.insiderBuying: Significant insider buying recently, insiders are bullish.
summary.highPledge: High insider pledge ratio, financial risk to note.
summary.foreignConcentration: High foreign ownership concentration, concentration risk.
summary.foreignExodus: Foreign capital accelerating outflow, selling pressure.
summary.dayTradingHigh: Day trading ratio at {ratio}%, speculative activity.
summary.dayTradingExtreme: Day trading ratio at extreme {ratio}%, very high risk.
summary.concentrationHigh: High large-holder concentration, stable ownership structure.
summary.institutionalFlow: Recent fund flows: Foreign {foreign}, Investment Trust {trust}.
summary.institutionalBuyTrend: Institutional net buy for {days} consecutive days, bullish structure.
summary.institutionalSellTrend: Institutional net sell for {days} consecutive days, bearish structure.
summary.limitUp: Hit daily limit up (+10%), extremely strong bullish momentum, be cautious chasing highs.
summary.limitDown: Hit daily limit down (-10%), extremely strong bearish pressure, exercise extreme caution.
summary.disclaimer: Auto-generated analysis summary for reference only, not investment advice.
summary.confluenceVolumeBreakout: Volume breakout above resistance, price-volume aligned, high breakout reliability.
summary.confluenceInstitutional: Institutional buying aligned with technical strength, positive fund flow confirmation.
summary.confluenceBottomReversal: Multiple bottom reversal signals in confluence, higher probability of bullish turn.
summary.confluenceFundamentalTechnical: Fundamental growth aligned with technical strength, medium-term positive outlook.
summary.confluenceTopReversal: Multiple top reversal signals in confluence, increased bearish reversal risk.
summary.confluenceBearishBreakdown: Breakdown below support with bearish alignment, downtrend confirmed.
summary.confluenceValueTrap: Low valuation but weakening trend, potential value trap.
summary.confluenceValueInvestment: Low valuation with attractive yield, value investment conditions met.
summary.confluenceMomentumBreakout: Technical breakout with bullish MA alignment, strong momentum.
summary.confluenceInstitutionalExit: Institutional selling with foreign outflow, bearish market structure.
summary.mixedSignals: Mixed bull/bear signals present, consider waiting for directional confirmation.
summary.priceVolumeWeakRally: Weak rally signal: price up with declining volume.

comparison.needMoreStocks: Select at least 2 stocks to compare
comparison.radarCaption: Outer = better; all axes normalized 0–100 (valuation inverted: lower P/E scores higher)
comparison.verdictTie: Mixed results, decide based on your strategy
